title: A Look At Aehr Test Systems (AEHR) Valuation As AI Orders And Investor Meetings Draw Focus
description:
Aehr Test Systems (AEHR) just drew fresh attention after disclosing record production orders tied to a leading hyperscale AI customer and flagging upcoming one-on-one meetings with institutional investors at the Craig-Hallum conference.
See our latest analysis for Aehr Test Systems.
Aehr’s recent conference spotlight and AI related orders have arrived after a strong run, with the share price returning 176.9% over 90 days and a very large 1 year total shareholder return, even as the 7 day...
